name: bx-ai-agents-skills
description: Bryan Xiao's personal Claude Code plugins for Azure DevOps, Copilot Studio authoring, and product management workflows.

plugins.name: azure
plugins.description: Azure DevOps interaction via the az CLI — work items, sprints, repos.

plugins.name: copilot-studio
plugins.description: Authoring helpers for Microsoft Copilot Studio agents — topics, variables, logging, best practices.

plugins.name: technical-pm
plugins.description: Composable, on-demand product-management skills — demand capture, theme synthesis, PRD authoring, technical design, work-item translation, and exec narrative.

plugins.name: better-planning
plugins.description: Custom planning system with strict role separation — a read-only planner (Opus), a scoped research agent (Haiku), and a sole CLAUDE.md writer (Sonnet). Invoke via /plan <task>.

plugins.name: office-tools
plugins.description: Standard suite of office-related skills, such as powerpoint and Excel.
